R:T

Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Flex1,PC,PCdesc,Flex3,YearPeriod,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9,Flex2,Flex4,BusCat,TP,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3
Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,PC Description,Program,YearPeriod,Division,Location,Segment,Portfolio PC,GL Grp,Incl_Excl,ACD,TP,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt
Co,Flex2,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,PC,YearPeriod
Update x set Crcy = y.Field1 From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Swap' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '14%' or GL like '15%' or GL like '287%') and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('18','20','21') and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set UWYR = '1959' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = ''
Update TransX set UWYR = '1958' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and UWYR = '9999'
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and len(contract) = 8 and contract like '20%'
Update TransX set contract = 'UNKNOWN' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co like '3%' and contract in ('','US GAAP UW RESULT')
Update x set x.Flex2 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,4) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
Update x set x.Flex2 = y.Field1 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on substring(GL,1,3) = y.Descr and y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'LIC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
Update TransX set Flex2 = Flex2 + 'x' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '%999%'
Update TransX set Amt1 = round(-coalesce(Amt1,0),2), Amt2 = round(-coalesce(Amt2,0),2), Amt3 = round(-coalesce(Amt3,0),2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL < '3000000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,PC,TP,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,YearPeriod,Flex5,Flex2,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID, Co,PC,TP,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,YearPeriod,'N/A' as Flex5,Flex2,round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Co,PC,TP,BusCat,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,YearPeriod,Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

Update x set x.PCdesc = y.Descr, x.Flex3 = y.Program, x.Flex5 = y.Product, x.Division = y.Division, x.Region = y.Region, x.Location = y.Location, x.Zone = y.Zone, x.Hierarchy = y.Hierarchy from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.Flex1 = y.Crcy from TransX x inner join Companies y on x.Co = y.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex4 = (case when Flex2 like '%x' then 'E' else 'I' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(TP) = 4
Update TransX set Flex4 = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2999','3999')
Update TransX set Flex6 = Division, Flex7 = rtrim(Region + ' ' + Location) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division in ('US_INS_OPS','LATAMER','FIRV') and Flex6 is NULL
Update TransX set Flex6 = Region, Flex7 = rtrim(Location + ' ' + Zone) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Region in ('LONBRANCH','EUROPE','ASIA','NEWLN')
Update TransX set Flex6 =Location, Flex7 =' ' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Location in ('CAN','USA')
Update TransX set Flex6 = rtrim(Division + ' ' + Region + ' ' + Location), Flex7 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL

Update x set Flex9 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.BusCat + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex8 = Hierarchy where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex9 = c.Portfolio_PC from TransX x inner join IR17_Contracts c on x.Contract = c.Contract and x.UWYR = c.UWYR and x.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(x.Flex9,2,2) in ('UI','NL','EL') and not x.Co = '2999'
Update TransX set Flex2 = 'RCR IF' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = 'RCR' and Co = '2999' and TP like 'F%'
Update TransX set Flex2 = 'RCR IF' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = 'RCR' and Co = '2999' and TP = '' and (Contract = '' or Contract = 'RRP RECLASS')
Update TransX set Flex4 = (case when PC like '6%' then 'E' else 'I' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = 'RCR IF'
Update TransX set TP = '2308', Flex4 = 'X' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = 'DAH' and TP = ''
Update x set Rate1 = c.Rate From TransX x inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Flex1 and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Amt1 = Amt3, Amt2 = round(Amt3/Rate1,2), Flex3 = x.Crcy, Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex9 = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC in ('','UNKNOWN') and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2001' and not '2001 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2001 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2001') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2002' and not '2002 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2002 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2002') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2005' and not '2005 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2005 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2005') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and not '2007 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2007 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2007') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and not '2008 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select '2008 ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where co = '2008') ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR

Insert into IR17_Contracts (Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Portfolio_PC,Flex1) Select distinct Co,Contract,UWYR,min(YearPeriod),min(Flex9),min(PC) from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,YearPeriod,Flex9,PC from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Co in ('2003','2004','2006','4110') or Co like '22%') and not Co + ' ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR in (Select Co + ' ' + Contract + ' ' + UWYR from IR17_Contracts where (Co in ('2003','2004','2006','4110') or Co like '22%')) ) x where UWYR <> '' and Contract <> '' and Contract <> 'UNKNOWN' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ') y group by Co,Contract,UWYR
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]

Delete from IR17_LIC where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R64' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_LIC (Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,TP,PC_Desc,Program,YearPeriod,GL_Grp,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Flex1,PC,TP,PCdesc,Flex3,YearPeriod,Flex2,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,'R64',Flex4,BusCat,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '

Delete from IR17_LIC_Canada where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R64' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_LIC_Canada (Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,TP,PC_Desc,Program,YearPeriod,GL_Grp,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Flex1,PC,TP,PCdesc,Flex3,YearPeriod,Flex2,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,'R64',Flex4,BusCat,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '

Delete from IR17_LIC_Singapore where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R64' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_LIC_Singapore (Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,TP,PC_Desc,Program,YearPeriod,GL_Grp,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Flex1,PC,TP,PCdesc,Flex3,YearPeriod,Flex2,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,'R64',Flex4,BusCat,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING'

Delete from IR17_LIC_HudCAD where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R64' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Insert into IR17_LIC_HudCAD (Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Co_Crcy,PC,TP,PC_Desc,Program,YearPeriod,GL_Grp,Doc_Amt,LC_Amt,LC2_Amt,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Portfolio_PC) Select Co,Contract,UWYR,Crcy,Flex1,PC,TP,PCdesc,Flex3,YearPeriod,Flex2,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,'R64',Flex4,BusCat,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
